steps.title: Use the making process
steps.content: The passage describes Freeman winding palm fronds around sweetgrass by hand with a sewing bone. The blank needs a phrase showing that the baskets are made by hand using sweetgrass and palmetto palm.

steps.title: Reject non-material meanings
steps.content:
• Choice A means signaled by, not made using the materials.
  • Choice C means symbolized by, which does not describe construction.
  • Choice D suggests gathering with the materials rather than making baskets from them.
The remaining choice describes handmade construction from those materials. The answer is B.
